title: CDS View with input parameters — filter at query time
description: CDS View with input parameters — filter at query time. Key topics: Input parameters defined in WITH PARAMETERS block. Parameters typed using existing data elements (e.g. /dmo/travel_id). Parameters referenced via :param_name in WHERE clause.

sections.title: Key Learning Points
sections.description:
◆Input parameters defined in WITH PARAMETERS block
◆Parameters typed using existing data elements (e.g. /dmo/travel_id)
◆Parameters referenced via :param_name in WHERE clause
◆No extra annotations needed — consumed in ABAP via explicit param passing
◆Parameters are mandatory by default (use DEFAULT to make optional)
◆@Semantics annotations are essential for downstream consumption

sections.title: CDS Source Code

content:
Key Learning Points

◆Input parameters defined in WITH PARAMETERS block
◆Parameters typed using existing data elements (e.g. /dmo/travel_id)
◆Parameters referenced via :param_name in WHERE clause
◆No extra annotations needed — consumed in ABAP via explicit param passing
◆Parameters are mandatory by default (use DEFAULT to make optional)
◆@Semantics annotations are essential for downstream consumption

CDS Source Code

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZPRAC_SQL_PARAM'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
@EndUserText.label: 'Practice CDS - Parameterized view with input params'
define view ZPRAC_CDS_PARAM
  with parameters
    p1_travel_id : /dmo/travel_id,   -- Parameter 1: Travel ID filter
    p2_agency_id : /dmo/agency_id    -- Parameter 2: Agency ID filter
  as select from /dmo/travel
{
  @Environment.systemField: #CLIENT
  key client            as Client,
  key travel_id         as TravelId,
      agency_id         as AgencyId,
      customer_id       as CustomerId,
      @Semantics.date: true
      begin_date        as BeginDate,
      @Semantics.date: true
      end_date          as EndDate,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      booking_fee       as BookingFee,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      total_price       as TotalPrice,
      currency_code     as CurrencyCode,
      description       as Description,
      status            as Status,
      @Semantics.user.createdBy: true
      createdby         as Createdby,
      @Semantics.date: true
      createdat         as Createdat,
      @Semantics.user.lastChangedBy: true
      lastchangedby     as Lastchangedby,
      @Semantics.date: true
      lastchangedat     as Lastchangedat
}
where
      travel_id = :p1_travel_id
  and agency_id = :p2_agency_id
details:
even on parameterized views (Fiori, Analytics, OData)

USAGE IN ABAP:

SELECT * FROM ZPRAC_CDS_PARAM(

p1_travel_id = @p_travel,

p2_agency_id = @p_agency )

INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_travel).

DATA: p_travel TYPE /dmo/travel_id VALUE '00000009',

p_agency TYPE /dmo/agency_id VALUE '070032'.
